query:
WITH moved AS (
             UPDATE files
                -- `::int` or postgres reads the two-argument `substring` as the
                -- regex one and infers a text parameter.
                SET path = $3 || substring(path from $4::int)
              WHERE import_id = $1
                AND left(path, length($2) + 1) = $2 || '/'
              RETURNING 1
           )
           SELECT count(*) as "count!" FROM moved
